nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tesia
nodes.summary: Tesia（Tesia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如灰腹地莺、Javan tesia、Russet-capped tesia等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Javan tesia
nodes.summary: Javan tesia（Tesia superciliaris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Javan tesia。

nodes.name: Javan tesia
nodes.summary: The Javan tesia (Tesia superciliaris) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Cettiidae. It is endemic to Java in Indonesia. The Javan tesia is a small tesia with long legs and almost no tail. It feeds on insects in the undergrowth of broadleaf forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Javan tesia (Tesia superciliaris) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Cettiidae. It is endemic to Java in Indonesia.

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。
